ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used for the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the cryptocurrency was launched */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Official website URL of the cryptocurrency */,
  "blockchain_platform" TEXT /* Blockchain platform used by the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiat_currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiat currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the fiat currency (e.g., USD, INR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the fiat currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used for the fiat currency (e.g., $, ₹) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country or region where the fiat currency is primarily used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the fiat currency */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the cryptocurrency in the specified fiat currency */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the exchange rate was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currency_rates_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_rates" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical rate entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the fiat currency */,
  "price_on_date" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency on the specified date */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_rates_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* User's preferred fiat currency for viewing rates */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_currency FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_currency") REFERENCES fiat_currencies ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_wallets" (
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user wallet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user owning the wallet */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency in the wallet */,
  "wallet_address" TEXT /* Public address of the wallet */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the wallet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wallet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_wallets_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_wallets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user owning the portfolio */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the cryptocurrency held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolio_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user setting the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "alert_price" REAL /* Price at which the alert triggers */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the alert is active */,
  "triggered_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading volume recorded */,
  "trade_volume" REAL /* Volume of trades executed on that date */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., CoinMarketCap) */,
  "api_url" TEXT /* API endpoint URL for fetching data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the data was updated */,
  "data_quality" REAL /* Quality score of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the transaction */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency involved */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transaction fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_transactions_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was recorded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., notification frequency) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
